summary: Complete frontend testing of Textinators landing page - all functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with all sections visible
Navbar displays with logo and navigation links (desktop and mobile)
Hero section with correct headline 'Stop Dangerous Text Messages Before They Strike'
All CTA buttons redirect to NoMoreScamCalls.com in new tab (hero, navbar, CTA section)
Features section displays 6 feature cards correctly
How It Works section shows 4 steps correctly
Protection section displays family protection info with 3 protection cards
Footer section displays correctly with logo and copyright
Mobile menu toggle works perfectly on smaller screens
Smooth scroll navigation works for all nav links (Features, How It Works, Protection)
Secondary CTA 'See How It Works' navigates correctly
All section content verified (hero badge, tagline, titles, stats)
